chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1591 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.6786/2023 3. For hearing of main case 05-03-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Liaqat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General Sindh a/w Dilawar Soomro, Focal Person/ Assistant Education Officer, (Primary) Ghotki @ Mirpur Mathelo.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has filed compliance report of District Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki @ Mirpur Mathelo/respondent No.5 and submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been resolved and his Bio-metric has been changed. Report has been read by the counsel for the petitioner and is satisfied. Accordingly, this petition has served its purpose and is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
